summary: Bookstore app called 'Gopal Book Agency' with Internet Identity authentication. Admin access is being updated so the logged-in user's Internet Identity principal automatically has admin privileges.
architectural_notes: Authentication uses Internet Identity (passkeys/biometrics) instead of username/password
Admin privileges are tied to Internet Identity principal IDs in the backend

existing_features.title: Update the frontend admin check flow so that after a user logs in with Internet Identity, the app immediately reflects their admin status without requiring a manual page refresh.

new_feature_requests.summary: Automatically grant admin access to the logged-in Internet Identity principal

Update the backend so that the first Internet Identity principal to log in is automatically set as the admin, or if an admin is already set, provide a way to bootstrap admin access by setting the deployer's principal as the admin on canister initialization.
